_comment: Example HPCC environment configuration for TestGeneratorAgent.py --env-config.
_usage: Run only containerized tests: --env-config environments.json --env containerized

environments.name: containerized
environments.description: Kubernetes-deployed HPCC cluster (microk8s / Docker). Requires containerized environment to be running.

environments.name: baremetal
environments.description: Bare-metal / native HPCC installation on Ubuntu. Requires HPCC Platform .deb package installed.

environments.name: secure
environments.description: Bare-metal HPCC installation with htpasswdsecmgr authentication enabled. Requires 'user' and 'password' to be set.
